The '''T'rinn''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with bright plumage and claws, and a body plan which allowed them to wield a shoulder-mounted [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]].<ref name="HSaTLL" /> In [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]],<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> [[Unidentified T'rinn mining technician|one]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] T'rinn worked as a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] within the criminal mining operation of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[J'uoch]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]]. She was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the operation was attacked by the [[Guardian Corps]], a brigade of [[war-robot]]s under the control of a group known as the [[Survivors (Dellalt)|Survivors]], who feared that J'uoch was a threat to them.<ref name="HSaTLL" />

==Behind the scenes==
A T'rinn first appeared in ''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'', a novel written by [[Brian Daley]] and released in [[1980]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as a corpse}}
